hero.subtitle: Book directly with licensed local guides across the USA & Canada. Custom VIP experiences crafted just for you — from historic landmarks to hidden gems.
hero.directBooking: No middlemen. No commissions. No markups.
hero.directBookingDescription: iGuide Tours connects you directly with professional tour guides. We don't take a percentage of your tour price.

services.label: What We Offer
services.title: Tour Services
services.subtitle: From VIP private tours to group adventures, we create unforgettable travel experiences across North America.
services.vipDesc: Exclusive one-on-one experiences tailored to your interests. Our guides design a perfect itinerary just for you.
services.groupDesc: Join like-minded travelers on curated group experiences. Perfect for social adventurers seeking shared discoveries.
services.customDesc: Tell us your time and interests — we'll craft a unique route covering hidden gems and iconic landmarks alike.
services.multilingualDesc: Our guides speak Russian, English, Polish, German, French, Spanish, Mandarin, and Japanese fluently. Experience every destination in your preferred language.

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.title: What Travelers Say
testimonials.t1: Our guide made Washington DC come alive! Speaking Russian was a huge plus — we understood every detail of American history like never before.
testimonials.t2: The VIP tour of New York was incredible. Our guide took us to spots we never would have found on our own. Worth every penny!
testimonials.t3: We booked a custom family tour across three cities. The attention to detail and personalized itinerary was beyond our expectations.

about.label: About Us
about.title: Who We Are
about.p1: iGuide Tours, based in Bethesda, Maryland, specializes in providing private tours led by professional and multilingual local guides across major cities in the United States and Canada.
about.p2: Founded by Michael Zlotnitsky, who has over 35 years of experience in the tourism industry, the company emphasizes personalized experiences that showcase the history, culture, and cuisine of each destination.
about.p3: With a focus on VIP tours, iGuide Tours offers clients the opportunity to explore iconic landmarks and hidden gems alike — all in their preferred language. Whether it's a family vacation, a business trip, or a special celebration, our team crafts unforgettable journeys tailored to your needs.
about.p4: When you book with iGuide Tours, you book directly with the guide — no middlemen, no commissions, no markups. You get the best price and a genuine, personal connection with your guide.
